purpose: versioned source of operational rules, conditions, incident sources, approved actions, prohibited actions, owners and conflict policy

rules.prohibited_action: low-level element changes director rules directly

rules.condition: worker execution or repeated worker incident
rules.approved_action: director rules-management contour updates worker rule after analysis

rules.condition: task execution, result handoff, blocker, or testing assignment
rules.approved_action: curator assigns contour and records event
rules.prohibited_action: contour writes to main workspace without PASS

rules.condition: before a registry is accepted or changed
rules.prohibited_action: mark registry PASS without schema validation

rules.condition: artifact moves from development to testing or main workspace
rules.prohibited_action: copy artifact to main workspace without PASS proof
low-level element sends external object message directly

rules.condition: new incident proposes a rule change
rules.approved_action: deduplicate, version, record source incident and owner
curator assigns a non-authoring contour when possible
rules.prohibited_action: authoring contour approves its own candidate as final without independent check

rules.approved_action: general director curator resolves or escalates to operator if strategic

rules.condition: product repository returns incident, fix or improvement
rules.approved_action: clean feedback through curator and propose rule/update
rules.prohibited_action: apply product-specific workaround globally without analysis

rules.approved_action: attach proof file or changed artifact path
continue to next backlog item without waiting unless operator decision is required

conflict_policy: new rule must reference source incident; duplicate conditions are merged or versioned, not copied blindly
